title: Floorplan a congested or timing-stressed design
description: Guide placement of critical blocks into regions when the router struggles or timing depends on locality.
body: Use when place-and-route reports congestion or critical paths sprawl across the die. Do not let the tool place freely when locality is essential, since spread-out logic adds routing delay. Actions: identify the congested or critical blocks, assign them to placement regions near related logic and I/O, and verify routing utilization drops. Validation signals include reduced congestion in the placement report and improved slack on the previously critical paths. Risk boundary: an overly tight floorplan can itself create congestion, so escalate to relaxing regions when utilization spikes locally.
